articles.title: Robert Kraft backs Mike Vrabel after controversial offseason: ‘No one is infallible’
articles.description:

articles.title: Boston federal judge bars Trump administration from using obscure clause to make huge funding cuts
articles.description:
“The President and his allies cannot hold critical programs hostage to their personal whims and political ideologies, destabilizing the country by yanking essential federal funding that was already awarded to the states.”

The post Boston federal judge bars Trump administration from using obscure clause to make huge funding cuts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston federal judge blocks Trump administration from using obscure clause for funding cuts.
Judge's ruling protects essential federal funding already awarded to states, including Massachusetts.
Local programs in Boston will remain funded, preventing potential destabilization of critical services.
